title: maqaq #4743
definition:
1) to decay, pine away, rot, fester
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to fester (of wounds)
        1a2) to rot, rot away
        1a3) to moulder away
        1a4) to pine away
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to rot
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to fester (of wounds)
        1a2) to rot, rot away
        1a3) to moulder away
        1a4) to pine away
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to rot

    NASB:  to decay, rot, fester, pine away
